data.title: Write failing tests for ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs and add normalize-imports dispatch test to ts-morph-adapter
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Two test files to create/update:

1. **Create tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh**: Tests for ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs (Node.js script). Uses TS fixture files with unsorted/duplicate imports. Skip gracefully if ts-morph not installed.
   - test_sorts_imports: Fixture with unsorted imports → sorted alphabetically after run
   - test_deduplicates_imports: Fixture with duplicate imports → duplicates removed
   - test_outputs_json: Output is JSON with files_changed, transforms_applied, errors, exit_code
   - test_idempotency: Run twice → same output
   - test_mixed_import_styles: Handles relative, absolute, re-export imports without corruption
   - test_no_change_when_already_sorted: Already-sorted file → files_changed=[], transforms_applied=0

2. **Update tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-adapter.sh** (existing file from story 3260-24ed): Add test for normalize-imports dispatch:
   - test_normalize_imports_dispatch: RECIPE_NAME=normalize-imports with fake node → adapter dispatches to normalize-imports script (fake verifies dispatch path)

Also add .test-index entry for ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs: tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh
- [ ] TS fixture files exist at tests/fixtures/ts-normalize-imports/
  Verify: test -d tests/fixtures/ts-normalize-imports
- [ ] test-ts-morph-adapter.sh updated with normalize-imports dispatch test
  Verify: grep -q 'normalize.imports\|normalize_imports' tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-adapter.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry added for ts-morph-normalize-imports.mjs
  Verify: grep -q 'ts-morph-normalize-imports' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Valid bash syntax on both files
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-ts-morph-normalize-imports.sh
